name: who-is-the-spy
description: 谁是卧底 / Who is the Spy — multi-device party game (each player on their own phone)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n worker,client -c magenta,green "npm run dev -w @spy/worker" "npm run dev -w @spy/client"
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy -w @spy/worker
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @spy/shared && npm run typecheck -w @spy/worker && npm run typecheck -w @spy/client
